p.em: Intel x86-64 / ARMv8 translation table compatibility

g.title: Bit is cleared. No access of targeted type has occurred since last OS reset.
Sticky bit. Remains 1 until explicitly cleared by the Operating System.

ul.li: Persistence: Hardware only sets; OS must clear.
Purpose: Indicates page must be flushed to disk before eviction.
Trigger: Set on Read OR Write operations.
Persistence: Hardware only sets; OS clears during clock sweep.
Purpose: Used by LRU algorithms for eviction decisions.

g.title: Bit is cleared. No access of targeted type has occurred since last OS reset.
Sticky bit. Remains 1 until explicitly cleared by the Operating System.
